text: The new moon day, the three *aṣṭakās* (अष्टकाs), the three *anvaṣṭakās* (अन्वष्टकाs), the full moon of *Māgha*, the thirteenth day of the dark fortnight after the full moon of *Prauṣṭhapada*, and the ripening of rice and barley. // Vi_76.1 //

> These times for *śrāddha* (श्राद्ध) Prajāpati declared to be obligatory (*nitya*); /
> He who does not perform a *śrāddha* (श्राद्ध) on these days goes to hell. || Vi_76.2 ||
